title: Make AI Automations Read Sub Items
excerpt: I am using Monday AI automations to have a summary column so account managers can get a quick summary of a project’s status, based on the item’s updates. This automation is not picking up anything that is an update in th…

posts.author: clemontallo (Colin Lemon)
posts.cookedHtml: I am using Monday AI automations to have a summary column so account managers can get a quick summary of a project’s status, based on the item’s updates. This automation is not picking up anything that is an update in the subitems though and those are important elements of the overall project. Monday AI automations need to be able to read updates from an item’s subitems to provide a complete summary.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: You might try the Subitem Automation app. There is a recipe in that one where any update on a subitem can be copied to the parent item.

posts.author: mchauhan (Mahipalsinh Chauhan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Could you kindly share the solution?
I’m also looking to get updates from the sub-items rolled up to the main items.

posts.author: Fantasy-Media-Team (Fantasy Media Team)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @clemontallo , @mchauhan

We developed an app called Subitem Automations that solves this use case!

With this app, you can easily copy updates from subitems to parent items, ensuring that all important details are captured in one place.

Screen Shot 2025-03-09 at 16.25.031236×221 11.3 KB

You can find the app in the monday.com marketplace or here - “SubItem Automations”

Hope that helps! Let me know if you have any questions—happy to help!

Kevin
